- DIE_AREA is generous on purpose so placement and routing succeed
comfortably on a small/CPU-only OpenLane run.
- STD_CELL_LIBRARY/PDK target the SKY130 high-density cells used by the
rest of this project so the resulting GDS can be checked with the
- This config is intentionally minimal: extend it later with
CTS, power-grid, and signoff knobs as you learn OpenLane.
